cases.title: TS-29: Android mock-location indicator flagged as SpoofSuspected on check-in submit
preconditions: Active session with room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
Student coordinates within radius (10.762700, 106.660200)
TestClock within attendance window
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session and assert HTTP 200 with outcome Valid and session summary per BR-15
POST /check-in with tokenId, in-radius latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200, spoofMetadata { mockLocationDetected: true, platform: "android" } using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome SpoofSuspected and errorCode SpoofSuspected
Assert message Không thể xác minh vị trí. Liên hệ giảng viên. per AC-10a and error-handling §4.4
Query attendance_records for studentId and sessionId and assert status remains Pending (not Present)
Query check_in_attempts and assert latest attempt outcome SpoofSuspected with spoof_flags containing mockLocationDetected true
cases.expected: AC-10a satisfied: preflight passes; mock-location signal triggers SpoofSuspected at POST; check-in rejected pending instructor review per testing-plan TS-29

cases.title: Abnormally perfect GPS accuracy heuristic triggers SpoofSuspected rejection
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS and enrolled authenticated Student
Valid unexpired QrToken
In-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
spoofMetadata { mockLocationDetected: false, accuracyMeters: 1.0, platform: "android" } representing baseline perfect-accuracy heuristic per FR-10
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
POST /check-in with tokenId, in-radius coordinates, and spoofMetadata accuracyMeters below baseline threshold using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 and outcome SpoofSuspected
Assert attendance status remains Pending
Query check_in_attempts and assert spoof_flags records accuracyMeters heuristic signal (no raw lat/lng persisted per NFR-12)
cases.expected: AC-10a alternate path satisfied: abnormally perfect accuracy per baseline heuristic flags SpoofSuspected without granting Present

cases.title: Instructor manually sets SpoofSuspected student to Present with note and audit capture
preconditions: Active or Closed session within 24 h of closedAt assigned to Instructor A
Student attendance Pending after prior SpoofSuspected check-in attempt recorded
Authenticated Instructor A session with attendance:write for session scope
Physical verification completed per AC-10b business workflow
steps: Record attendance recordId for student with Pending status and SpoofSuspected attempt history
PATCH /attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "Xác minh trực tiếp — GPS nghi ngờ giả mạo" } using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 200 with updated record status Present and checkedInAt set
Query attendance_audit_log and assert entry with actor Instructor A id, beforeStatus Pending, afterStatus Present, and note per AC-10b
Verify AttendanceManualEdit audit event fields match error-handling §6.2
cases.expected: AC-10b satisfied: instructor override after physical verification updates record to Present; append-only audit log captures override per NFR-15

cases.title: GeoVerificationService.verifyLocation sets spoofSuspected when mockLocationDetected is true
preconditions: GeoVerificationService wired per checkin-qr module §2.4 and domain model §7.1
Session room coordinates (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
ClientGeoMetadata with mockLocationDetected true, platform android, in-radius client coordinates
steps: Invoke GeoVerificationService.verifyLocation with room coords, client coords inside radius, and clientMetadata mockLocationDetected true
Assert result.spoofSuspected is true
Assert result.spoofFlags.mockLocationDetected is true
Assert result.withinRadius is true (radius would pass if spoof check skipped)
Contrast: same call with mockLocationDetected false returns spoofSuspected false when other signals clean
cases.expected: GeoVerificationService module boundary flags mock-location per FR-10 independent of radius pass/fail

cases.title: CheckInService.submit persists SpoofSuspected attempt and emits SpoofFlagged security audit in PostgreSQL
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Active session, enrollment, Pending attendance_records row
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid
CheckInService wired with AttendanceRecordRepository, CheckInAttemptRepository, and audit writer per checkin-qr module
steps: Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId, in-radius coordinates, and spoofMetadata mockLocationDetected true
Assert returned outcome SpoofSuspected (not Success)
Query check_in_attempts and assert row inserted with outcome SpoofSuspected and spoof_flags JSONB populated
Query security audit store and assert SpoofFlagged event with sessionId, studentId, heuristic signals per AC-10c
Assert no raw latitude/longitude columns populated on check_in_attempts per NFR-12
Assert qr_tokens status remains Valid (not Consumed) and attendance remains Pending
cases.expected: AC-10c satisfied at module boundary: SpoofSuspected attempt logged with append-only SpoofFlagged security audit entry; no Present transition

cases.title: POST /check-in returns 400 SpoofSuspected envelope when mock location detected
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with Valid unexpired QrToken
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns HTTP 200 outcome Valid
In-radius coordinates with spoofMetadata mockLocationDetected true
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: true, platform: "android" } }
Assert HTTP status 400 Bad Request
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body outcome SpoofSuspected and errorCode SpoofSuspected
Assert response body message Không thể xác minh vị trí. Liên hệ giảng viên.
Assert no attendance field with Present on failure envelope per API design §6.3
cases.expected: HTTP 400 SpoofSuspected contract per API design §6.3; canonical failure envelope for GPS spoof baseline per FR-10

cases.title: SpoofSuspected check-in leaves attendance beforeState Pending and afterState Pending (retriable)
preconditions: attendance_records row with beforeState Pending and null checkedInAt
Active session and Valid QrToken
CheckInService.submit callable with spoof-triggering metadata
steps: Record beforeState: status Pending, checkedInAt null
Invoke CheckInService.submit with mockLocationDetected true
Assert result outcome SpoofSuspected (not Success)
Query attendance_records and assert afterState status still Pending
Assert checkedInAt remains null
Verify SM-04 outcome SpoofSuspected maps to no attendance state change per 07-state-machines.md §3.4 retry policy
cases.expected: beforeState Pending; afterState Pending unchanged; student may retry with legitimate GPS per state machine retriable failure policy

cases.title: Student denied PATCH /attendance preventing self-override after SpoofSuspected flag
preconditions: Student attendance Pending after SpoofSuspected check-in attempt
Authenticated Student session (lacks attendance:write per roles-permissions §2.3)
Known attendance recordId for own Pending row
steps: PATCH /attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "Self override" } using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Verify attendance status remains Pending
Assert no AttendanceManualEdit audit entry created for student actor
cases.expected: Only Instructor or TrainingOfficeAdmin hold attendance:write; students cannot bypass SpoofSuspected rejection via self-service edit per AC-10b instructor-only override path

cases.title: Mobile check-in preflight pass, GPS ready, then SpoofSuspected outcome with instructor contact guidance
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375×812
Active session with valid check-in deep link /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true with gpsSim=delay and mockLocation=1 query params for harness per demo-guides §7
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId&gpsSim=delay&mockLocation=1
Assert validating_token inline spinner during GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight
Assert data-testid gps-capture-step is absent until preflight returns HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Wait for GpsCaptureStep ready substate: Vị trí đã sẵn sàng visible without Spinner; aria-busy false; Xác nhận điểm danh enabled per AC-08f
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh submit control
Verify CheckInOutcomePanel displays danger-level SpoofSuspected state per ui-states §4.3
Verify message Không thể xác minh vị trí. Vui lòng liên hệ giảng viên. per user-flows §WF-03
Verify primary action Liên hệ giảng viên instructs student to see instructor for manual mark
Verify no success confirmation or Present badge shown
cases.expected: AC-10a surfaced in mobile web UI after BR-15 preflight gate and GPS ready state; mock-location spoof flag triggers SpoofSuspected; student directed to instructor for physical verification

cases.title: Instructor session monitor shows SpoofAlertBadge on rows with SpoofSuspected attempts
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport assigned to Active session
At least one student with SpoofSuspected check_in_attempt and Pending attendance on roster
Session monitor route /sessions/:sessionId/monitor loaded
steps: Navigate to session monitor dashboard for Active session with spoof-flagged student
Verify AttendanceRosterTable row for affected student displays SpoofAlertBadge inline indicator
Hover or focus badge and verify tooltip Vị trí nghi ngờ giả mạo — cần xác minh thủ công per SpoofAlertBadge spec
Verify ShieldAlert icon variant matches ui-states spoof alert styling
Tap student row and verify Chỉnh sửa action available for manual Present override per user-flows spoof override note
cases.expected: Instructor alerted to spoof-suspected students via SpoofAlertBadge; manual override path accessible for AC-10b physical verification workflow

cases.title: Mock location rejected before radius check despite in-radius coordinates
preconditions: Active session with room GPS and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Authenticated enrolled Student with Pending attendance
Valid QrToken and coordinates well inside radius
spoofMetadata mockLocationDetected true (would pass BR-02 if evaluated first)
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
POST /check-in with in-radius coordinates and mockLocationDetected true
Assert HTTP 400 outcome SpoofSuspected (not 200 Success)
Verify check-in pipeline short-circuits at step 12 spoof heuristics before step 13 radius per validation-rules §5.1
Assert attendance remains Pending and token not Consumed
Contrast: identical request with mockLocationDetected false and same coords returns 200 Success when all rules pass
cases.expected: FR-10 spoof handling runs before BR-02 radius check per business rules §BR-02 exceptions; in-radius coords cannot bypass spoof detection

cases.title: SpoofSuspected failure does not consume submitted QrToken for retry with clean metadata
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student Pending attendance
Fresh Valid QrToken T1 not yet consumed
Student can submit two sequential attempts within attendance window
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight for token T1 and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Student POST /check-in with tokenId T1, in-radius coords, mockLocationDetected true and assert HTTP 400 SpoofSuspected
Query qr_tokens for T1 and assert status remains Valid (not Consumed)
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight for T1 again and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Student POST /check-in with same tokenId T1, same coords, mockLocationDetected false
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success and attendance Present
Query qr_tokens for T1 and assert status Consumed after successful retry
cases.expected: SpoofSuspected rejection does not consume token; student may retry with legitimate GPS metadata within token TTL per retriable failure policy

cases.title: SpoofFlagged security audit entry is append-only with heuristic signals only
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with security audit table per error-handling §6.2
Prior SpoofSuspected check-in attempt exists for known sessionId and studentId
Audit repository readable in integration test harness
steps: Trigger CheckInService.submit producing SpoofSuspected outcome with mockLocationDetected and accuracyMeters signals
Query security audit entries filtered by event type SpoofFlagged for sessionId and studentId
Assert exactly one new append-only entry created (no update-in-place)
Assert stored fields include sessionId, studentId, and heuristic spoof_flags (mockLocationDetected, platform)
Assert entry does not contain raw latitude, longitude, or accuracy coordinates beyond heuristic metadata per NFR-12
cases.expected: AC-10c satisfied: append-only SpoofFlagged security audit entry created on spoof-suspected event with investigation-safe fields only

cases.title: Unassigned instructor denied PATCH /attendance for spoof override on another instructor session
preconditions: Active session owned by Instructor A with student Pending after SpoofSuspected attempt
Authenticated Instructor B not assigned to session class-subject pair
Known attendance recordId for spoof-flagged student
steps: PATCH /attendance/:recordId with body { status: "Present", note: "Override attempt" } using Instructor B session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Verify attendance status remains Pending
Assert no AttendanceManualEdit audit entry for Instructor B
cases.expected: Spoof override requires assigned instructor scope per BR-08; cross-instructor manual edit denied even for physical verification workflow

cases.title: Flow C spoof override path: flag attempt then instructor Present edit with audit verification
preconditions: Flow C setup: Active session with Instructor A assigned
Student submits check-in with mockLocationDetected true producing SpoofSuspected
Session may remain Active or be Closed within 24 h for edit window
steps: Student GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Student POST /check-in with spoof metadata and assert SpoofSuspected; attendance Pending
Instructor A GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance and verify student shows Pending with spoof alert context
Instructor A PATCH /attendance/:recordId { status: Present, note: "Xác minh trực tiếp tại lớp" }
Assert HTTP 200 and attendance Present
Verify audit log actor Instructor A, beforeStatus Pending, afterStatus Present, note captured
Confirm Flow C manual fallback tags AC-10b and NFR-15 per testing-plan §6
cases.expected: End-to-end spoof detection → instructor physical verification override → audit trail satisfies AC-10a through AC-10b in manual fallback flow

cases.title: Preflight returns 200 for valid enrolled token; spoof heuristics evaluated only at POST not preflight
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid qr_tokens row
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Student will later submit with mockLocationDetected true at POST layer
steps: Invoke GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with enrolled Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 with outcome Valid and session summary (classCode, subjectCode, roomName)
Query attendance_records and qr_tokens and assert no writes occurred (read-only preflight per validation-rules §3.6a)
Invoke POST /check-in with same tokenId, in-radius coordinates, spoofMetadata mockLocationDetected true
Assert POST returns HTTP 400 outcome SpoofSuspected while preflight had returned Valid
cases.expected: BR-15 preflight chain does not evaluate FR-10 spoof signals; SpoofSuspected rejection occurs only at POST pipeline step 12 per validation-rules §5.1

cases.title: Preflight rejects ExpiredQr, NotEnrolled, SessionMismatch, TokenNotFound before spoof POST path
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session fixtures
Expired QrToken, valid token for wrong session query, unknown token UUID, and non-enrolled student session
Spoof metadata would trigger SpoofSuspected if POST were reachable
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:expiredTokenId/preflight as enrolled Student; assert HTTP 403 errorCode ExpiredQr
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:validTokenId/preflight as non-enrolled Student; assert HTTP 403 errorCode NotEnrolled
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:validTokenId/preflight?sessionId=:wrongSessionId as enrolled Student; assert HTTP 403 errorCode SessionMismatch
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:unknownUuid/preflight as enrolled Student; assert HTTP 404 errorCode TokenNotFound
Verify no check_in_attempts rows with outcome SpoofSuspected created from preflight calls alone
Query attendance_records and qr_tokens and assert no writes from any preflight call
cases.expected: Preflight failure outcomes block GPS and spoof submit paths; FR-10 spoof evaluation unreachable when preflight read-only chain fails per validation-rules §3.6a

cases.title: gpsSim and mockLocation query params ignored when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false
preconditions: Web build compiled with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false (production default)
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with valid QrToken; GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200
Check-in deep link includes gpsSim=delay, gpsLat/gpsLng in-room coordinates, and mockLocation=1
steps: Load /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId&gpsSim=delay&gpsLat=10.762700&gpsLng=106.660200&mockLocation=1 with simulation flag off
Verify client does not auto-resolve simulated coordinates or mock-location flag from query params
Verify browser geolocation API is invoked (or permission prompt shown) instead of simulation layer
Without granting real GPS, assert check-in cannot proceed to SpoofSuspected outcome solely from mockLocation=1 param
Grant real geolocation with platform mock-location indicator in device test matrix or POST spoofMetadata directly via API to verify FR-10 server path
cases.expected: NFR-24 satisfied: production builds ignore gpsSim/mockLocation URL params; spoof detection relies on real device signals or direct API spoofMetadata per demo-guides §7
